sources.title: Knife Edge 2010 Dvdrip
sources.description: A successful Wall Street trader returns to England with her new husband and five-year-old son, but their new start together turns into a nightmare when they move into a country house which contains a terrible secret.

metadata.Plot: A successful Wall Street trader returns to England with her new husband and five-year-old son, but their new start together turns into a nightmare when they move into a country house which contains a terrible secret.
metadata.Writer: Fiona Combe, Anthony Hickox, Robb Squire
metadata.Actors: Hugh Bonneville, Natalie Press, Matthieu Boujenah
